This is the CMIP7 updates blog. It is a lightweight, file-based CMS: there is

no
admin interface and no database to edit

. To publish an update, you just add a
markdown file.
language-yaml shiki shiki-themes material-theme-lighter github-light github-dark

---
title: "My CMIP7 update"
description: "A one-line summary shown on the blog index."
date: "2026-07-01"
author: "Your Name"
---
A one-line summary shown on the blog index.

Write the body in standard markdown — headings, lists, code blocks, tables,
links and images all work.
Commit and push. The post appears at

and is listed on the
blog index automatically — no code changes required.

directory and reference them with an absolute
path:
